description: Use this API to modify the power flow solution parameters in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Sections 6.3.13, 6.3.18, 6.5.1 and 11.7). This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = solution_parameters_5(intgar, realar)

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of twenty one elementsNone. (input).

intgar.description: ITMX, Gauss-Seidel maximum number of iterations (100 by default).
ITMXN, Newton-Raphson maximum number of iterations (20 by default).
ITMXTY, TYSL maximum number of iterations (20 by default).
MXTPSS, maximum number of times taps and/or switched shunts are adjusted during power flow solutions (100 by default).
MXSWIM, maximum number of times an induction machine can change state (e.g., from “running” to “stalled”) during power flow solutions (10 by default).
MovIterMax, maximum number of MOV iterations in short circuit solutions (20 by default).
IsolLvl, Maximum number of levels to go outward when isolating an element by breaker actions (4 by default).
CaIterMax, Maximum number of repeat solutions for each contingency case (20 by default).
CntChk, Check for duplicate contingency labels (<=0 = no, >0 = yes) (0 by default).

realar.description: ACCP, Gauss-Seidel real component acceleration factor (1.6 by default).
ACCQ, Gauss-Seidel imaginary component acceleration factor (1.6 by default).
ACCM, special MSLV acceleration factor (1.0 by default).
TOL, Gauss-Seidel convergence tolerance (0.0001 by default).
ACCN, Newton-Raphson acceleration factor (1.0 by default).
TOLN, Newton-Raphson mismatch convergence tolerance (default Newton power flow solution tolerance option setting by default).
ACCTY, TYSL acceleration factor (1.0 by default).
TOLTY, TYSL convergence tolerance (0.00001 by default).
BLOWUP, blow-up threshold (5.0 by default).
PQBRAK, constant power load characteristic breakpoint (0.7 by default).
THRSHZ, zero impedance line threshold (0.0001 by default).
ADJTHR, automatic adjustment threshold tolerance (0.005 by default).
ACCTAP, tap movement deceleration factor (1.0 by default).
TAPLIM, maximum tap change per adjustment (0.05 by default).
DVLIM, largest abs(delta v)/abs(v) for Newton solutions (0.99 by default).
NDVFCT, non-divergent required improvement factor (0.99 by default).
VCTOLQ, Newton-Raphson voltage controlled bus reactive power mismatch convergence tolerance (default Newton power flow solution tolerance option setting by default).
VCTOLV, Newton-Raphson voltage controlled bus voltage error convergence tolerance (0.00001 by default).
SWVBND, percent of voltage controlling band mode switched shunts to be adjusted per power flow iteration (100.0 by default).
MovTolerance, MOV iteration tolerance in short circuit solutions (0.01 by default).
MovAlpha, MOV acceleration factor in short circuit solutions (0.3 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Invalid percent value for switched shunt adjustment. - Invalid induction motor treatment code.
